lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: Gather round, one and all! It's time for the Darkmeyer Auctions!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: We've got quite the lineup for you today! So, let's get started!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: First up, a 37 year old male from sector four!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: He's got plenty of blood in him, and he'll keep your home clean of any mess!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: Let's start the bidding at 1,000 coins! Do I have 1,000?

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: Here!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: 1,000 coins to the vyre at the back! Do I have 2,000?

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: I'll take it!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: 2,000 for the lady in red! Anyone for 3,000?

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: Here!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: I have 3,000! But do I have 4,000?

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: Anyone for 4,000?

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: 3,000 going once!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: 3,000 going twice!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: Sold to the vyre at the back!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: Right then! Next we have a 22 year old female from sector six!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: She's young and filled with optimism! Perfect for those who enjoy a taste of hope!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: We'll start with 5,000 for this one! Do I have any takers!

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: Right here!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: 5,000 coins for the lady at the front! How about 6,000?

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: Give it to me!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: I have 6,000! Who wants 7,000!

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: I'll take her for 10,000!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: 10,000! We have a bid of 10,000! You lot really want this one! Anyone up for 12,000?

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: Give it to me!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: Anyone for any more? 13,000?

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: 12,000 going once!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: 12,000 going twice!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: Sold for 12,000 coins! Enjoy!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: Okay, finally we have a 41 year old male from sector three!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: Careful! This one is feisty! In fact, we've had to put him in a cage!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: If you can put him in his place though, you're in for a treat! His blood is the sweetest around!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: We'll begin with 4,000 coins!

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: Right here!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: I have 4,000! But do I have 5,000?

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: I'll take it!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: 5,000 coins to the vyre in red! Do I have 6,000?

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: Right here!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: 6,000 coins! Looks like we have a competition here! Let's take it to 7,000!

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: I'll take it!

lines.speaker: Spectator
lines.text: I'll take it!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: We're at 7,000! But will it go higher? 8,000 coins?

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: 7,000 going once!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: 7,000 going twice!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: Sold to the vyre in red!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: Well there you have it! That's all for now from the Darkmeyer Auctions!

lines.speaker: Auctioneer
lines.text: Fear not though. We'll be back with more, very soon!
